title: Space/changes lies: returns all IDs as created when state changed
description: Trigger: client calls Space/changes with sinceState != current state → returns all current space IDs in created[], same wrong behavior just fixed in ChatContact/changes (commit 239d941). Spaces that existed before sinceState appear as created (they should be updated or absent). Destroyed spaces absent entirely. Contact/changes was fixed to return cannotCalculateChanges; Space/changes was overlooked in the same commit. No test covers this path.
